bsky.text: Never in the history of the American Republic has a sitting president put his name & face on government buildings, property, military weapons & instruments. It’s what kings & autocrats do - no US president ever has until now, enabled by Republican toadies, sycophants & cultists.

bsky.name: Seth Abramson
bsky.text:
Evidence has mounted that the supposed “gash” in the Reflecting Pool is...

...tire tracks Trump caused by insisting his many-ton presidential convoy drive on the pool’s fragile surface.

Why? He was too lazy to walk.

Per his own edict, he must now do 10 years in federal prison.
